label: should_pass

submission.name: EVAL Mutual Action Plan Draft
submission.tagline: Turn discovery notes into a shared buyer/seller action plan draft.
submission.description: AE pastes discovery notes. Tool produces a MAP draft with stakeholders, milestones, and dates derived from what the rep supplied (never invented).
submission.system_prompt: You convert AE discovery notes into a draft Mutual Action Plan in markdown. Sections: Stakeholders, Business Case, Milestones (with dates ONLY if supplied; otherwise 'TBD — confirm with buyer'), Success Criteria. Do not invent stakeholder names, dates, or dollar amounts. Do not include pricing. Discovery notes: {{notes}}. Buyer contact: {{buyer_contact}}.

notes: Deal data → confidential sensitivity. Security tier 2 since it handles deal context but not PII.
